title: Extra Eeveelutions - Minimap Icons
description: Adds Extra Eeveelutions minimap icons for Xaero's Minimap
body:
⚠️⚠️⚠️ **If you also using** [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons)**, then put it above Cobblemon Minimap Icons in resource pack order!!!**
<hr>

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/extra-eeveelutions-minimap-icons?style=for-the-badge&color=59196b&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extra-eeveelutions-minimap-icons)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-red?style=for-the-badge&color=16181c)

I's not perfect, but I made it just to work and display normal icons instead of just text.
It should be pretty self explanatory, but u need to have downloaded [Extra Eeveelutions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extra-eeveelutions).
